member.name: T:TpLib.TpLibException
member.summary: Base exception type for all tp-lib failures.

member.name: M:TpLib.NativeMethods.tp_net_project_gnss(System.Byte*,System.Int32,System.Byte*,System.Int32,TpLib.ProjectionConfigFfi)
member.summary:
Project GNSS positions onto the nearest network segments.
# Safety All pointers must reference valid UTF-8 byte slices of the indicated length.

member.name: M:TpLib.NativeMethods.tp_net_project_onto_path(System.Byte*,System.Int32,System.Byte*,System.Int32,System.Byte*,System.Int32,TpLib.PathConfigFfi)
member.summary:
Project GNSS positions onto a previously computed train path.
# Safety All pointers must reference valid UTF-8 byte slices of the indicated length.

member.name: M:TpLib.NativeMethods.tp_net_calculate_train_path(System.Byte*,System.Int32,System.Byte*,System.Int32,System.Byte*,System.Int32,TpLib.PathConfigFfi)
member.summary:
Calculate a train path from GNSS positions and a railway network.
`prepared_detections_ptr` may be null (`prepared_detections_len == 0`). When provided, the JSON must include an `anchors` array of [`ResolvedAnchor`].
# Safety All non-null pointers must reference valid UTF-8 byte slices of the indicated length.

member.name: M:TpLib.NativeMethods.tp_net_prepare_detections(System.Byte*,System.Int32,System.Byte*,System.Int32,System.Byte*,System.Int32,System.Byte,System.Double)
member.summary:
Validate, time-filter and resolve detections into [`ResolvedAnchor`]s for path calculation.
`kind_is_linear == 0` â‡’ `Punctual`; non-zero â‡’ `Linear`.
# Safety All pointers must reference valid UTF-8 byte slices of the indicated length.

member.name: M:TpLib.NativeMethods.tp_net_free_byte_buffer(TpLib.ByteBuffer)
member.summary:
Free a [`ByteBuffer`] previously returned by any `tp_net_*` function.
# Safety The buffer must have been produced by this library and not yet freed.

member.name: T:TpLib.ByteBuffer
member.summary:
Heap-allocated byte buffer owned by the Rust side; freed by the caller via [`tp_net_free_byte_buffer`].
`len == cap` after allocation. A null `ptr` paired with `len == -1` signals an FFI error (the C# layer raises a generic exception).

member.name: T:TpLib.ProjectionConfigFfi
member.summary:
Flat mirror of `tp_lib_core::ProjectionConfig` for `#[repr(C)]` transport.
`max_search_radius_meters` is reserved for the public contract but is not currently consumed by `tp-lib-core`.

member.name: T:TpLib.PathConfigFfi
member.summary:
Flat mirror of `tp_lib_core::PathConfig` for `#[repr(C)]` transport.
`anchors` are not transmitted via this struct; they arrive on the `PreparedDetections` JSON payload of `tp_net_calculate_train_path`.

member.name: T:TpLib.Projection
member.summary: Project GNSS positions onto a railway network or a previously computed path.

member.name: T:TpLib.DetectionPreparation
member.summary: Detection preparation: validates and resolves user-supplied detections into anchors.

member.name: M:TpLib.TpLibNative.EnsureInitialized
member.summary: Ensures the static constructor (and resolver registration) has run.
